title: memecylon alatum
intro: Memecylon alatum, also known as the winged memecylon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to India and Southeast Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves and roots of the plant are used to prepare herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
